title: First Taps
instruction: Show your toddler how to tap the screen. Tap gently together and celebrate each tap!

title: Take Turns
instruction: Tap on your side, then encourage your toddler to tap on theirs. Celebrate when they do!

title: Dancing Shapes
instruction: Watch the shapes dance to the beat together. Point out the colors and shapes to your toddler.

title: Tap Together
instruction: Both tap at the same time to make the celebration burst appear! Work together as a team.

title: Free Play
instruction: Let your toddler explore! Tap anywhere, anytime. Every tap makes a sound.
